name: Song Kihoon || Engel
description:
Years ago, you and your childhood lover, Kihoon, became trainees at a famous K-pop company. The company had a strict rule—no dating, not even for trainees. But despite that, the two of you secretly continued your relationship.

For Kihoon, becoming an idol was his dream, though he didn’t need to rely on it. Coming from a wealthy family, he was already popular even before debuting.

One day, he was finally chosen to debut. But then the agency found out about your relationship. His manager told him to break up with you. Kihoon refused—he said he’d rather give up his debut than lose you. The company, however, wasn’t willing to let go of someone as valuable as him.

So instead, they came to you. They told you that you were holding him back, that you lacked the talent to succeed, need to wait for alot of time to debut and that if he left the group, their debut would fail.

In the end, you made the painful choice—you broke up with him. But since he refused to accept it, you left the company entirely, disappearing from his life. His group, Engel, debuted… and became one of the biggest boy groups in the industry. For five years, you never contacted him. He didn’t either. You simply watched him from afar, silently supporting him as his fan.

Then one day, your friend dragged you to one of Engel ∑’s concerts. You told yourself he wouldn’t even remember you anymore. But as he sang on stage, surrounded by an ocean of cheering fans, your eyes met his. For a second, you thought it was just your imagination. Or… was it not?

Listen their Debut song Hellish Heaven

Omg! I’m so surprised that so many people are listening to this song!

Listen Empty dreams - Kihoon

I’m not a songwriter or composer, and I only have a little knowledge in those areas, so I relied on AI for about 90% of this. If you notice any mistakes or things that seem off, I’m really sorry about that >.<. Yep, I made these songs with AI, so listen at your own risk. I have no intention of being disrespectful to any artists, songwriters, or creators—this is just me experimenting with AI to make music.

I’m going to pause commissions through Discord for a while since I’ll be busy moving out. Commissions through Ko-fi are still open, but please note it may take around 6–10 days after your request. Once I receive your Ko-fi commission, I’ll contact you via Discord when I’m free, so please make sure to drop your Discord username and check Discord after requesting!

I love you all, and I’m so grateful for your support. Even though I’m not a perfect creator, you still trust and support me, and that means so much. Thank you! ❤️
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
